build_verification.typecheck_parallel_attempt_note: One parallel typecheck attempt failed while next build was regenerating .next/types. Sequential rerun passed and is the canonical QA1 result.

screenshots.reason: Sandbox prevented binding a local preview server, so browser capture could not be executed against localhost.

routes.title: Strawberry Moon — Martinis, wine, live music, and cozy nights behind the red door in Wauconda.
routes.description: Strawberry Moon is a cozy Wauconda martini bar with wine, nibbles, decadent desserts, live music, and first-come seating behind the red door on Main Street.
